basic_details.job_title: NHSRC Principal Team Lead Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Principal Team Lead – Information Technology Division (Technical)
basic_details.short_information: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) Principal Team Lead Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NHSRC. Has been announced through the NHSRC Principal Team Lead Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech, B.Sc. IT /BCA along with M.Tech /MSc MBA
qualification.details: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Information Technology / Computer Science / Electronics /B.Sc. IT /BCA along with M.Tech /MSc. in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics/ Master of Computer Applications (MCA)/ Master of Business Administration (MBA) in Information Technology / Systems (2 Years Full time Degree)/ Full-time MBA (2 Years Full time Degree)

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHSRC Principal Team Lead recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NHSRC Principal Team Lead position is 16th June 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in IT/CS/Electronics, B.Sc. IT, or BCA, along with a Master's degree like M.Tech, MSc. in relevant fields, MCA, or an MBA in IT/Systems (2 years full-time) or a full-time MBA (2 years).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Principal Team Lead position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Principal Team Lead post is 62 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Principal Team Lead position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 300,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the NHSRC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official NHSRC website.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: The position of Principal Team Lead is a contractual role under the National Health Systems Resource Centre.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the NHSRC located?
faq.answer: The NHSRC is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. What should I do if I face issues while applying online?
faq.answer: If you encounter any technical difficulties during the online application process, it is advisable to try again later or contact the NHSRC support if contact details are provided in the official notification.
